title: System Menu (SysMenu)
text: System Menu (SysMenu) Window property of a form or application shell that determines whether the Windows system menu and buttons to minimize, maximize, and close the window are available for this window. Valid values: True or False . Value Description True The title bar contains a button in the left corner, enabling the user to access the Windows system menu. Default if Window Type is Normal . False The system menu is disabled and cannot be displayed. Usage Dynamic? No Dependencies: If the Caption property is False , the System Menu property cannot be set. Description When the system menu is disabled, it is also not possible to use keystrokes to minimize, maximize, or close the window. The title bar contains no buttons to perform these actions. You can close the window using Ctrl+F4 , but there is no Close button. Applies To Form Application Shells for Desktop Applications Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
